---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report incorrect information or broken links
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📍 Location
- **File/Section:** 
- **Line/Link:** 

## 🔍 Current Behavior
Describe what is currently happening.

## ✅ Expected Behavior
Describe what should be happening instead.

## 📸 Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 🔗 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## 📋 Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues for similar reports
- [ ] I have verified the information is incorrect
- [ ] I have provided sufficient detail for reproduction
